commit_scope: Streaming staged-input reader + a live, parameterized native awk tool on fkwu — whole-file inputs now cross without carrier pre-slicing. input-stream.fk (is-line / is-next / is-fold) folds a per-line function over staged input with recursion bounded by LINE COUNT (not byte count) and no O(n^2) accumulator, so the full 38KB manifest folds (918 lines) where the naive per-byte reader segfaulted. fkwu-awk.fk + scripts/fkwu_awk.sh make it a live tool: `fkwu_awk.sh <file> '<awk-program>'` stages the awk program on line 0 and the file's data after it, streams each line through sh-bi-awk (the four-way native awk), and returns the numeric result computed on the fkwu c-bootstrap kernel — no read_file, no host awk, no bash in the compute loop. Verified parameterized over the whole manifest: shell-awk->127, shell-exec->511, shell-parse->255, each MATCHING host awk.

commands: is-fold line-count over the full 38KB manifest -> 918 (host wc -l: 918), no segfault
local_validation.fourth_arm: The awk COMPUTE is the four-way shell-awk band (127). input-stream.fk + fkwu-awk.fk are fkwu-only (input_byte tag 17 is not in Go/Rust/TS) — host-io carrier utilities for the sovereign-run path, not four-way claims.
local_validation.native_binary: fkwu universal-kernel binary streams the whole manifest by line and computes native awk -> matches host awk for every probed stem.
local_validation.notes: Bug trail resolved this step: (1) the naive saw-read was O(n^2) + byte-deep -> segfault on 38KB; is-fold streams by line (depth = line count) -> crosses. (2) HOF and closures both work on fkwu (proved: (ap inc 5)->6, (ap add-p 5) with captured p->12), so the per-line reducer captures the staged program. (3) fk_pv_root (fkwu_run.sh's value entry) prints a runtime-built STRING as its box, not its text (a string LITERAL prints fine), so fkwu-awk.fk returns an INTEGER (str_to_int) — the honest unit for a numeric field query; a general string/multi-row awk wants the print_str effect entry (fsh-main's), the named follow-on. read_file stays a per-kernel host-io carrier (the thin carrier reads the file's bytes).

ci_validation.notes: Observation; the awk compute's four-way gate runs in CI on the shell-awk band.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy; a Form-runtime tool + sovereign-run lane.

phase_gate.gate: Make whole-file staged inputs cross on fkwu (streaming, no O(n^2)) and turn the sovereign reconciliation into a live, parameterized, callable native tool — not a fixed demo.
phase_gate.next: print_str effect entry so general string/multi-row awk output crosses; a presence-count query variant; then wire form-cli roadmap's manifest_has to fkwu_awk behind a warm-lane gate (opt-in until the fkwu table is pre-built) so the live verb routes through the sovereign kernel without a cold-start regression.
